title: デビュー戦の後に・フライト延長希望！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun has successfully made her
debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite how much she admired the Twinkle
Series, she finds the races she's competed in so
far to be more boring than expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The difference between her dreams and reality
has her in a tailspin. But she's still at the debut
level. If she's able to run in more races, I'm sure
she'll change her mind...
